rows.label: qev060106_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's terrible!
S-Shiraton-kun has been kidnapped!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0003
rows.name:
I came here earlier hoping to get a look
at this "revoltant" thing he does.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0004
rows.name:
And I saw him arguing with some
suspicious-looking woman...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0005
rows.name:
Then, the woman forcefully shoved him into a trailer
and took him straight outside NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for information about the woman.

rows.label: qev060106_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what they were arguing about.

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0006
rows.name:
I don't know the details... but I've seen her
a few times around the BLADE area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0007
rows.name:
I think she's a BLADE.
A silver-haired woman wearing a Doll pilot suit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0008
rows.name:
It seemed like she was pressuring Shiraton-kun
to hand over his backpack and staff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0009
rows.name:
She looked so furious that I couldn't even bring myself
to step out until they drove away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0010
rows.name:
The trailer left through the East Gate and
sped off straight east across the Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0011
rows.name:
If an incident like this happens, the friendly relationship
we've finally built with the Zaruboggan could be
wiped clean and returned to square one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'm begging you, please head to the Primordial Wilderness
immediately and rescue Shiraton-kun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0013
rows.name:
From what I've asked around, the trailer carrying
Shiraton-kun left through the East Gate and
sped straight eastward...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060106_MSG0014
rows.name:
Please, won't you go save him before
this becomes irreversible?[ST:wait ]
